data.Description: Reliable stowage and release of spacecraft and deployable components upon an external command (active) or spring-loaded (passive).
data.Technology Examples: Clamp band systems, Frangibolts, release nuts, pin pullers, bolts, burn wire, hinges, and passive spring-loaded switches

data.Description: Allows for rotatory motion of spacecraft components.
data.Technology Examples: Solar Array Drive Assembly, directional antennas, combination of dampeners and absorbers

data.Description: Provides pointing accuracy and stability for spacecraft and components.
data.Technology Examples: Reaction (momentum) wheel assembly, gimbals, component pointing, passive methods
